_session_note: Share formula overhaul completed. All K values and nutrition factors need retesting from scratch. Boom-bust confirmed before share fix. Session ended mid-retuning.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.target_platform: Termux (terminal) now, egui Android APK later
overview.status: active — share formula fixed, all constants need re-validation
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: World state: land slots, active biomes, placed organisms, fitness resolution, biome contests, world effect application. Zero I/O.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks, two hands, discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

sim_harness.location: sim_test/ — standalone Rust binary, runs on Termux
sim_harness.config: sim.toml — edit organism and land stats without recompile

food_pool_options.A: current pop, no fitness scaling — cliff-edge collapse
food_pool_options.C: last-turn fitness scaling — gradual signal, tighter feedback

sim_harness.note: biomeS.rs is sim version of biome.rs. Game biome.rs needs all sim fixes applied before playtest.

share_formula_overhaul.change: All resource shares are now population-based, not need-based
share_formula_overhaul.water: water_share = (org_pop / total_animal_pop) * water — equal share per individual
share_formula_overhaul.herbivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_herb_omni_pop) * food_pool — equal share per individual
share_formula_overhaul.carnivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_carn_pop) * prey_value — equal share per individual
share_formula_overhaul.rationale: Need-weighted shares let high water_need organisms claim more water, masking food deficits with water surplus. Now each individual gets equal access to resources, need determines if that access is sufficient.
share_formula_overhaul.impact: ALL K values, nutrition factors, and food_need values need retesting. Previous confirmed values invalid.

components.deficit_term: product((f - critical) / (1.0 - critical)) for all f < 1.0

fitness_system.critical_check: Any single factor below FITNESS_CRITICAL_NEED → returns FITNESS_AUTO_DOWNGRADE * 0.5

thresholds.note: No stable zone — upgrade_if_best == downgrade_if_worst. Dynamic oscillation only.

fitness_system.food_pool_timing: Uses last_population (Option B) — one-turn delay. Snapshot at start of resolve().

resources.sunlight: tolerance_factor(supply, sun_need, 999.0). Shading: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K per size group.
resources.minerals: resource_factor(share, mineral_need). share = (reach / total_reach) * minerals. Per-individual, pop cancels.
resources.food_herbivore: Pop-based share of food_pool. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).
resources.food_carnivore: Pop-based share of prey_value. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).

pressure_system.trampling: sum(max(0, herb_size - prod_size) * herb_territory * herb_pop) * PRESSURE_K2. Per-producer, scales with absolute herbivore numbers.
pressure_system.sparsity: COMMENTED OUT — kept for potential camouflage trait use later. K=9, 20% max penalty on food_need symmetrically.

predation_system.hunt_limit: carnivore.size * hunt_multiplier — prey strictly less than
predation_system.predation_factor: 1 / (1 + carn_food_need / prey_share * PREDATION_K). Applied to herbivore fitness.
predation_system.hunt_size_bonus: Currently multiplicative via HuntSizeMultiplier trait. DECISION PENDING: change to additive.

needs_retesting_after_share_fix.HERBIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR: now 0.7 (not yet a named constant — inline value)

omnivore.note: NOT YET SIMULATED after share fix

carnivore.note: Last tested: water_need=1.4 food_need=0.7 — herbivore still extinct. Share fix changes dynamics.

card_ideas_noted.camouflage_trait: PredationResistance scaling with population density — uses sparsity-style mechanic
card_ideas_noted.carnivorous_plant: Producer role with predation-like mechanic — gains fitness from small animal presence, applies pressure to small herbivores. Needs new TraitEffect or hybrid role.
card_ideas_noted.hunt_size_bonus: HuntSizeMultiplier should be additive not multiplicative — pending fix

confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.note: These were confirmed before share formula change. Likely still directionally correct but values will differ.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.P1_H1: Boom-bust. Grows to P4 H4, collapses turn 5 without carnivore.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.carnivore_window: Safe entry H2-H4. Too early kills herbivore, too late collapse inevitable.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.collapse_threshold: P4 H6 extinction, P5 H6 survives.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.design_goal: No stable P+H — collapse is default. Carnivore or omnivore required for stability.

next_session_tasks: Retest P1 H1 boom-bust with new share formula — confirm dynamics still correct
Retune PRESSURE_K1, PRESSURE_K2 for new share formula
Make HERBIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR a named constant in types.rs
Apply all biomeS.rs changes to game biome.rs
